meta.title: Computer Science student
meta.description: Matteo Vittori builds modular software systems across computer vision and the web.

work.title: Systems shaped by different kinds of complexity.
work.description: Case studies spanning software architecture, computer vision, web products, immersive interaction, and embedded systems.

about.title: An engineer interested in boundaries.
paragraphs: I’m a Computer Science student at the University of Camerino, focused on building software that balances solid architecture with intuitive user experiences.
I value small responsibilities, honest trade-offs, reproducible evidence, and interfaces that reveal the underlying model instead of hiding it.
